name: toggle-group-sm
visual_summary: The toggle-group-sm component is a compact variant of a toggle group, displaying a small selection of toggle buttons. It is used when a user needs to switch between a few options, typically in a navigation or settings context. Suitable for mobile applications where space is limited.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-group-sm
Description: The toggle-group-sm component is a compact variant of a toggle group, displaying a small selection of toggle buttons. It is used when a user needs to switch between a few options, typically in a navigation or settings context. Suitable for mobile applications where space is limited.
Style: e.g. material, flat, compact
Interactions: e.g. animated, clickable, toggleable
Tags: toggle, group, settings, navigation, mobile

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
